title: viola lungtungensis
intro: Viola lungtungensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae, commonly known as a type of violet. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola lungtungensis include its ability to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, Viola lungtungensis is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and dried flower powders.
